_comment: Reference bench + calibrators for fair-XP-mirror CR calibration. See docs/CR_CALIBRATION.md. 'bench' = pool used to compose opposing squads (plain, trustworthy CRs spanning a wide range of XP so any budget can be composed for targets up to ~CR 13). 'calibrators' = trusted-CR brutes whose mirror tie-points fit the curve g; deliberately excludes pack-tactics/synergy monsters so g measures a clean baseline. 'anchors' = the most-trusted subset for the bench fixed-point. XP is derived from CR in code. To rate above CR 13, extend both lists with clean higher-CR anchors.
_bench_note: Mixed damage types so resist-nonmagical monsters aren't blanket-inflated and magic defenses get tested: martial brutes + casters (Acolyte/Priest/Mage bring radiant/fire/force). Calibrators stay pure brutes to anchor the curve.
_calibrator_note: High-CR anchors are the monotone big-HP brute chain Storm Giant(13) -> Goristro(17) -> Kraken(23) -> Tarrasque(30). Ice Devil/Iron Golem/Balor/Pit Fiend were dropped: they tie LOWER budgets than lower-CR anchors (arena/heuristic underplays their complex kits), which inverts the curve. They stay in 'bench' for XP coverage and are rated as (legitimately) overrated. High-CR ratings are approximate — legendary monsters are underplayed by the heuristic (see LLM pass).
